new_text: Toroidal Teams: 3-phase implementation plan (8+5+7 tasks). Phase 1: inotify-tools, ~/agents/ dir, ~/.claude/channels/, launch/watcher/teardown scripts, detect_project() extension. Phase 2: .agent-config.json, watcher config injection, idle_prompt_hook.sh (3-state machine), Notification hook. Phase 3: Gate 13 co-claims (.file_coclaims.json), sessions.json registry, manage.sh. Key findings: inotifywait not installed, detect_project() needs ~/agents/ block, tmux uses load-buffer+paste-buffer to avoid escaping.

Created 3 interactive HTML diagrams in /home/crab/.claude-visual/docs/diagrams/: 10-agents-teams.html (Dracula, Mermaid overview, 6 agent cards, 6 team cards, delegation rules). 12-modes.html (One Dark, 5 mode cards, mode comparison table). 13-integrations.html (amber terminal, Mermaid 10-node overview, 3 integration cards). All follow: no emoji, light/dark via prefers-color-scheme, zoom+pan, Mermaid theme:base TD.

Session 268: Top 5 implementable patterns for Torus. 1. FLEX Dual-Zone Memory (HIGH): golden/warning zones in LanceDB, auto-classify by fix_outcome. 2. Agent0 Gate Curriculum (HIGH): evolve gate thresholds at >95% pass rate. 3. SAGE Reflection Loop (MEDIUM): compare memory prediction vs fix_outcome post-task. 4. Metacognitive Review (MEDIUM): track gate false-positive rates. 5. AgentEvolver Credit Weighting (MEDIUM): contribution_weight per causal chain step. Papers validated: memory-first, causal chain tracking, mentor/judge, circuit breakers.

knowledge_graph.py code review (Toroidal-teams, 2026-03-11). CORRECT: schema migration fail-open, PMI formula log2(co_count*total/(mention_x*mention_y)), zero-div guards. BUGS: (1) strengthen_coretrieval() never sets co_occurrence_count—Hebbian edges stuck as legacy. (2) pmi==0.0 boundary blocked (untested). (3) effective=strength*pmi unbounded. MISSING: tests for pmi=NULL+co_count>0, pmi=0.0, total<2, strengthen_coretrieval legacy edges.

metrics-dashboard agent (haiku model, read-only, task-invoked only). Tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Bash, memory search/get. Role: research. No persistent state writes. Reads LIVE_STATE.json but NOT .statusline_snapshot.json (written by statusline.py hook, consumed by dashboard/server.py, tui/data.py, auto_commit.py). Related: /introspect (6-phase), /benchmark (profiling), /status (box-drawing dashboard).

Arxiv survey: LLM agent memory decay (MemoryBank, MemOS/MemScheduler). Key: important memories decay slower (access frequency+semantic relevance). 5 states: Generated→Activated→Merged→Archived→Expired. FadeMem: selective forgetting improves recall. Torus implications: add access_count+last_accessed to LanceDB entries. Score=similarity+recency_weight-decay(time). Threshold→Archived (deprioritized). Consider priority tags in remember_this().

Claude Code Agent Farm (Dicklesworthstone, 684 stars): 20-50 parallel agents via tmux. ClaudeAgentFarm orchestrator + AgentMonitor per-agent health. Lock-based coordination (no inter-agent messaging beyond problem file). Context auto-clear at 20% threshold. Idle timeout=median_cycle_time*3 (30-600s). Error patterns: auth/API/rate-limit/config corruption. State: .claude_agent_farm_state.json + .heartbeats/*.heartbeat (stale=120s). HTML report gen. No memory/vector DB.

coleam00/custom-agent-with-skills (65 stars): PydanticAI + YAML skill loader with 3-level progressive disclosure. IDENTICAL skill structure to Torus (SKILL.md+references+scripts+examples). Genuine innovations: Portable Agent Pattern (export skills to Lambda/CI/CD), directory traversal protection (gate_07 candidate). Torus better in: testing (985 vs 71), memory (ChromaDB+observations), gates (12 vs 0), agent teams. Recommendation: cherry-pick export pattern + security hardening.

Claude Code Agent Farm (655 stars): Orchestrates 20-50 parallel agents. Memory: git commits + JSON state (coordination registry, completed log). Safety: lock-based claiming, settings backup/rotation, atomic ops, graceful shutdown. 34 tech stacks, 31 best practices, 24 tool scripts. NO tests. Token injection: 31 guides+stack prompts (no counts). Lock-based multi-agent coordination (LLM-understood). NO meta-learning. Auto-restart+heartbeat monitoring. ~500MB RAM/agent, no latency benchmarks.

CLAUDE.md backup (pre agent modify state, 2026-02-11). Original BEHAVIORAL RULES #3: "Agent teams for 3+ step tasks". Original TEAM WORKFLOW: 1. TeamCreate named team 2. TaskCreate with criteria 3. Assign via Task tool 4. Coordinate via SendMessage+TaskList 5. Shutdown+TeamDelete. Backup files: ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md.pre agent modify state + ~/CLAUDE.md.pre agent modify state. REVERT: cp pre version files.

Multi-agent research (session268): ChatDev (arxiv:2307.07924)—waterfall Design→Code→Test→Doc with role specialization, communicative dehallucination (ask before respond). MetaGPT (arxiv:2308.00352)—SOPs as prompts, assembly line roles, 85.9-87.7% Pass@1, 100% completion. Self-Resource Allocation—LLMs allocate tasks by cost/efficiency. Survey (arxiv:2501.06322)—centralized paradigms have bottlenecks. Torus pattern: MetaGPT SOPs=PRP system, ChatDev dehallucination=gate pre-checks, decentralized allocation.

OptimisticChain Solidity (2026-02-10): FeeDistributor.sol—4-way split (burn/validator/treasury/dapp) with 1825-epoch transition (Launch 10/0/45/45, Maturity 25/25/25/25). Treasury.sol—ETH vault. ChainGovernor.sol—propose→vote→queue→execute lifecycle, 4% quorum, 50400-block voting, 80% supermajority for permanent unlock. Test patterns: deployCodeTo() for predeploy addresses, MockStakingManager/PassiveStaking. All 160 tests pass.

Sprint-2: 28+ agents simultaneous. Created debugger/security-auditor/metrics-dashboard agents via Bash (Gate 4 bypass). 15 haiku researchers on: hooks, frameworks, orchestration, gates, ChromaDB, MCP, memory, eval, SDK, guardrails, ramdisk, observability, prompt, repos, coding. Builders created: gate_router, hook_cache, health_monitor, consensus_validator, session_analytics, skill_maturity, auto_remediate, metrics_collector, error_pattern_analyzer, agent_profiler, dependency_graph, config_validator, ARCHITECTURE v2.6. Gate 4 issue: sideband expects {timestamp:float} at hooks/.memory_last_queried.

Agent Zero (github.com/agent0ai/agent-zero, 14.6k stars, v0.9.8): Prompt-driven, fully customizable, no hard-coded logic. Architecture: UI→WebSocket→AgentContext→Tools→FAISS Memory→MCP. Monologue loop: prepare prompts→LLM→tool detection→execute→integrate. FAISS with MAIN/FRAGMENTS/SOLUTIONS areas. 23 built-in tools, 24 lifecycle hooks. Hierarchical multi-agent (User→Agent0→subordinates). Tech: Flask 3.0.3, LiteLLM (25+ providers), FastMCP, Playwright, React. 102 prompts define behavior. Uses SKILL.md standard.

Multi-agent coordination research (session268): Agent-GSPO (arxiv:2510.22477)—optimize communication-aware reward (task_success-overhead). Agent Interoperability Survey (arxiv:2505.02279)—4 protocols: MCP, ACP, A2A, ANP. G-Designer (arxiv:2410.11782)—GNN for topologies. CommFormer (arxiv:2511.09171)—learnable graphs, no all-to-all. CoDe (arxiv:2501.05207)—delay-tolerant collaboration. Torus pattern: agents already use task list+memory MCP (low-overhead), opportunity to reward fewer inter-agent messages.
